---
title: "Innovations"
---

My work involves developing open-source tools, cloud applications, and browser extensions to streamline geospatial workflows for researchers and data scientists.

## 🌍 Google Earth Engine Apps

::: {.software-grid}

::: {.software-card}
![Spectral Curve](https://placehold.co/400x200/2c7da0/ffffff?text=Spectral+Reflectance+Curve)
### Spectral Reflectance Curve
Analyze spectral signatures across multiple bands for precise land cover characterization.
[<i class="bi bi-rocket-takeoff"></i> Visit App](https://spatialgeography.projects.earthengine.app/view/spectral){.social-btn} [<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/pulakeshpradhan/){.social-btn}
:::

::: {.software-card}
![Phenology signature](https://placehold.co/400x200/2c7da0/ffffff?text=Phenology+Signature)
### Phenology Signature
A specialized tool for crop classification utilizing phenological signatures and time-series analysis.
[<i class="bi bi-rocket-takeoff"></i> Visit App](https://spatialgeography.projects.earthengine.app/view/signature){.social-btn} [<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/pulakeshpradhan/){.social-btn}
:::

::: {.software-card}
![Flood Susceptibility](https://placehold.co/400x200/2c7da0/ffffff?text=Flood+Susceptibility+AHP)
### Flood Susceptibility
Implementing Analytic Hierarchy Process (AHP) for rigorous flood risk assessment and mapping.
[<i class="bi bi-rocket-takeoff"></i> Visit App](https://spatialgeography.projects.earthengine.app/view/floodsusceptibility){.social-btn} [<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/pulakeshpradhan/){.social-btn}
:::

::: {.software-card}
![Odisha Flood Map](https://placehold.co/400x200/2c7da0/ffffff?text=Odisha+Flood+Map)
### Odisha Flood Map
Visualizing regional flood extent using multi-date satellite imagery for immediate response support.
[<i class="bi bi-rocket-takeoff"></i> Visit App](https://spatialgeography.projects.earthengine.app/view/odishaflood){.social-btn} [<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/pulakeshpradhan/){.social-btn}
:::

:::

## 📦 Python Packages

::: {.software-grid}

::: {.software-card}
![geeadvance](https://placehold.co/400x200/27ae60/ffffff?text=geeadvance+Package)
### geeadvance
Advanced functional programming utilities to supercharge your GEE Python API workflows.
[<i class="bi bi-box-seam"></i> PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/geeadvance/){.social-btn} [<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/pulakeshpradhan/geeadvance){.social-btn}
:::

::: {.software-card}
![deepgee](https://placehold.co/400x200/27ae60/ffffff?text=deepgee+Package)
### deepgee
A framework for bridging Earth Engine datasets with state-of-the-art Deep Learning models.
[<i class="bi bi-box-seam"></i> PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/deepgee/){.social-btn} [<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/pulakeshpradhan/deepgee){.social-btn}
:::

::: {.software-card}
![geeassist](images/geeai.jpg)
### geeassist
Personal AI coding assistant for the GEE Python environment, powered by Large Language Models.
[<i class="bi bi-box-seam"></i> PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/geeassist/){.social-btn} [<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/pulakeshpradhan/geeassist){.social-btn}
:::

:::

## 🛠️ Chrome Extensions

::: {.software-grid}

::: {.software-card}
![GEE AI Assistant](images/geeai.jpg)
### GEE AI Assistant
Transform the GEE Code Editor with integrated AI assistance for debugging and script generation.
[<i class="bi bi-browser-chrome"></i> Web Store](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/gee-ai-assistant/kldhacnbicjpbdiebjjflnhgcmheokkl){.social-btn} [<i class="bi bi-github"></i> GitHub](https://github.com/pulakeshpradhan/gee-ai-assistant){.social-btn}
:::

::: {.software-card}
![Quick Screenshot](https://placehold.co/400x200/e67e22/ffffff?text=Quick+Screenshot)
### Quick Screenshot
High-resolution browser capture tool optimized for geospatial mapping and documentation.
[<i class="bi bi-browser-chrome"></i> Web Store](https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/koeblknkgkpklkpcbfigakkfnhkkadnm){.social-btn}
:::

:::
